title: DisclosureFiling
description: A campaign-finance disclosure statement submitted by a filer (committee) to the CFB — the periodic report bundling contributions, expenditures, and balances for a filing period. NET-NEW WRITE: today a disclosure is submitted only through the login-walled C-SMART application (the CFB's web-based disclosure software); there is NO public submission API. The READ surface exists partially as the 'Late/Missing Disclosure Statements' dataset (2ujk-6z7u) and the statements listing on nyccfb.info. This schema serves both the read surface (list/get filings and their status) and the write surface (submit a disclosure statement).

filingId.description: Server-assigned filing / statement id. Omit on create; returned on the submitted resource.

status.description: Filing lifecycle status ('Status'). Set by CFB, not the filer.

statementNumber.description: Disclosure statement number in the cycle ('Statement').

daysLate.description: Days past the due date if late ('Days Late').

amendment.description: Whether this filing amends a previously submitted statement.

amendsFilingId.description: The filingId this statement amends, if any.

summary.description: Period totals reported in the statement.

contributions.description: Contribution transactions reported in this statement.

expenditures.description: Expenditure transactions reported in this statement.

certifiedBy.description: Name of the treasurer/candidate certifying the statement.
